Whether you’re cranking out emails at work or messaging after hours, it’s a 
lot more satisfying to type on a mechanical keyboard. At Drop, we team up with 
some of the biggest names in the business to bring you can’t-miss keyboards, 
keycaps, and accessories.


Our flagship keyboard, the CTRL, has all the features you could ask for—bright 
RGB backlighting, customizable keys, a sturdy aluminum case, and the latest 
USB-C connections. Its little brother, the ALT, packs all that into an even 
smaller layout to save space.
